title: Sniffer Potions
description: Adds potions that can be crafted from the pitcher plant
body:
This mod adds a use to the sniffer by adding two new potions brewable from the pitcher plant: the Potion of Growth and the Potion of Shrinking.

## Potion of Growth
This potion will increase your size, reach, and jump height

## Potion of Shrinking
This potion will decrease your size and reach

## Obtaining
The potion of growth is obtained from brewing the pitcher plant, and the potion of shrinking is obtained through a fermented spider eye.
